description: This file defines the demonstrative system in Njo Viri (Balanda). Demonstratives mark distance (near, far, very far) and number (singular, plural).

general_principle.structure: Balanda demonstratives distinguish distance from the speaker and agree in number. Plural forms are marked with the prefix 'ka-'.

distance_system.notes: ŋono (this) | kaŋono (these) | ŋana (that) | kaŋana (those) | ŋasinna (that very far but visible)

structure.structure: {"pattern": "Demonstrative + no + Noun", "note": "The copula 'no' links the demonstrative to the noun."}
structure.notes: Demonstrative + no + Noun | The copula 'no' links the demonstrative to the noun.

error_constraints.structure: Do not mix singular demonstratives with plural nouns.; Do not omit the copula 'no' in predicate constructions.
